greeting: Happy Friday, Jean. A few fires before you sign off — Shelley’s thread is the most time-sensitive. Here’s your full picture.

items.label: Phase 2 Weekly IT Projects Sync
items.detail: You’re leading. Standup format — sprint progress, blockers, deliverables. Good moment to mention the Denial/RFE descope.

items.label: 1:1 with Santiago
items.detail: Weekly check-in. Discuss project prioritization for next week and resource needs.

items.label: Focus time
items.detail: Protected block. Use it to prep the Executive Status slides.

items.label: EPMO EOW Check In
items.detail: Sara has been OOO all week — this may go async. Check if it’s still happening.

items.label: Executive Project Status Update
items.detail: With Yuri & Jhara. Main deliverable of the afternoon. Jhara is OOO until Apr 21 — confirm attendance with Yuri.

items.label: Reply to Shelley Henry — Denial/RFE dropdown
items.detail: Jill confirmed this can be descoped entirely. Ask Josh to submit a Litify ticket to update the dropdown. Shelley has flagged this twice this week and is waiting on your reply to close the thread.

items.label: Prep Executive Project Status slides
items.detail: For your 3 PM with Yuri & Jhara. Jhara is OOO so confirm if she’s dialing in. Focus on Phase 2 milestones and this week’s sprint blockers.

items.label: Review Hassan’s client escalation
items.detail: Call logs for 847-505-9912 are ready — Zulay and Naz pulled the RingCentral reports. Hassan is waiting for your guidance on next steps with the client.

items.label: Resolve folder naming with Danny Miller
items.detail: "Project Charters - DO NOT USE" is actively being used by the team. Either rename it or move contents and archive. Quick 5-minute decision.

items.label: Complete 1 overdue Asana task
items.detail: Check your My Tasks view — likely the documentation task from last sprint.

items.label: Complete 2 overdue Rippling tasks
items.detail: Probably time-off approvals or onboarding checklist items. Quick wins before EOD.

items.label: Shelley Henry — Denial/RFE Project Status
items.detail: Jill says descope the dropdown from the project, have Josh handle it standalone. Reply to Shelley confirming so she can update the tracker. Open since Wednesday.

items.label: Jaime Vargas — Critical Dates Taxonomy
items.detail: Follow-up from this week’s meeting. PPT attached, recording in the invite. No hard deadline but review before Monday’s portfolio meeting.

items.label: Alex Pavlov (Asana) — Closing the loop
items.detail: External email. Likely a product update or support thread closure. Quick glance to confirm no action needed.

items.label: Hassan Jassir — client escalation
items.detail: Asked Alejandro, Katheryn, Zulay, and Nazareth to pull call logs. Zulay & Naz delivered. Waiting on your review and guidance. The client has been described as intense.

items.label: David Molano — Litify CoE email template
items.detail: Shared first draft of the request confirmation template. No action needed now, but review before it goes live.

items.label: Danny Miller — folder naming confusion
items.detail: Flagged the "DO NOT USE" folder issue in Teams. A quick rename resolves it.

items.label: Sara Watson
items.detail: OOO all week. Back Monday but working from the Dublin office Mon–Thu. Morning meetings are your best window for real-time overlap. Today’s 2 PM check-in may go async.

items.label: Jhara Ochoa
items.detail: OOO until Apr 21. On the 3 PM invite today — unclear if she’s joining. She’ll need a quick catch-up when she’s back.

items.label: Timecards & week prep
items.detail: Standard Monday admin. Clear pending approvals and triage Asana/Rippling.

items.label: 1:1 Shelley & Jean
items.detail: Bring the Denial/RFE resolution. If you replied today, this should be a quick confirmation.

items.label: Focus time
items.detail: Protected block before the heavy afternoon.

items.label: EPMO Portfolio Review
items.detail: Full portfolio review. Sara in Dublin, Jhara back from OOO. Come prepared with project updates.

items.label: Litify Sprint #9 Review
items.detail: Stakeholder demo. Make sure the dev team has their demo environment ready. Review the sprint board beforehand.

items.label: Sara in Dublin (Mon–Thu)
items.detail: Plan for the 5-hour timezone gap.

items.label: Jhara returns from OOO
items.detail: Consider sending a quick summary of what she missed.
